data.title: LGL Group Schedules 2026 Annual and Investor Meetings
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

LGL Group ( (LGL) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, The LGL Group, Inc. announced that its 2026 Annual Meeting of Stockholders is scheduled for May 12, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET at the Harvard Club of New York City, followed by an investor meeting at 10:00 a.m. ET at the New York Stock Exchange. Proxy materials will outline the record date, voting matters and procedures, while attendance at the investor session will be subject to capacity and security constraints.

At the May 12 investor meeting, management planned to detail a strategy to build a defense technology platform within LGL through selective investments, acquisitions and connectivity partnerships, and to highlight its partnership with Legion Capital, a defense technology investment platform. Executives framed this push into national security, defense and resilient infrastructure—particularly precision timing and frequency capabilities—as a way to capitalize on rising allied defense budgets and shifting procurement priorities, positioning LGL to identify and scale mission-relevant technologies across areas such as space, autonomy, electronic warfare and cyber resilience for long-term, shareholder-focused growth.

The most recent analyst rating on (LGL) stock is a Buy with a $7.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on LGL Group stock, see the LGL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on LGL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, LGL is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by balance-sheet strength (near-zero debt) but held back by weakening revenue, uneven core profitability, and softer free-cash-flow momentum. Technicals are constructive but appear overbought, and valuation looks expensive given the current earnings profile; corporate leadership changes are a moderate positive but not yet reflected in fundamentals.

To see Spark’s full report on LGL stock, click here.

More about LGL Group

The LGL Group, Inc., listed on the NYSE American under the symbol LGL, is a holding company active in services, merchant investment and manufacturing. Its subsidiary Precise Time and Frequency, LLC produces industrial electronic instruments focused on precision time and frequency solutions from a facility in Wakefield, Massachusetts, while Lynch Capital International targets value creation through investments across diversified industries.

With engineering and design roots dating back to 1917, LGL has evolved from its origins as Lynch Glass Machinery, a glass-forming equipment maker, into a diversified owner-operator in precision engineering, manufacturing and services. The company, now headquartered in Orlando, Florida, pursues a growth strategy built on expanding both new and existing operations in markets tied to critical technologies and resilient infrastructure.

Average Trading Volume: 13,489

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $38.72M

data.title: Earth Science Tech Launches Vertically Integrated Telehealth Platform
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Earth Science Tech ( (ETST) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, Earth Science Tech, Inc. announced the official launch of MyOnlineConsultation.com through its MOCTeledoc, LLC unit, completing what it describes as a fully vertically integrated telehealth and pharmacy ecosystem. The platform connects a credentialed prescriber network with ETST’s compounding pharmacies, including RxCompound and Mister Meds, as well as external pharmacies, and will be marketed nationwide under the consolidated Peaks brand.

Following a cash-flow-positive beta phase, MOCTeledoc is positioned as a lean, scalable division that management expects to become a significant revenue stream alongside ETST’s compounding and direct-to-consumer businesses, which generated $25.9 million in revenue for the nine months ended December 31, 2025. By offering turnkey telehealth technology, clinical staffing and integrated fulfillment, the launch is intended to drive cross-divisional synergies, strengthen ETST’s competitive standing in digital health and create a more efficient funnel of prescriptions into its in-house pharmacy operations.

The most recent analyst rating on (ETST) stock is a Hold with a $0.11 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Earth Science Tech stock, see the ETST Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ETST Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ETST is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by strong financial performance (profitable operations, positive free cash flow, and minimal leverage). This is partially offset by weak technicals (price below key moving averages with negative MACD) and only moderate valuation support (P/E ~10.5, with no dividend yield data).

To see Spark’s full report on ETST stock, click here.

More about Earth Science Tech

Earth Science Tech, Inc. is a diversified holding company in the health and wellness sector, operating a vertically integrated portfolio that includes compounding pharmacies, telemedicine platforms and targeted healthcare facilities. Through subsidiaries such as RxCompoundStore.com, Mister Meds, Peaks Curative, DOConsultation.com and Las Villas Health Care, it provides sterile and non-sterile medications, personalized care and telemedicine connectivity across a growing network of U.S. states.

The company also manages Avenvi, a real estate and asset management arm, and MagneChef, a direct-to-consumer brand built on proprietary kitchen-product IP. Its social responsibility efforts are channeled through the Earth Science Foundation, a non-profit that helps patients with prescription costs, complementing its core healthcare-focused operations and reinforcing its positioning in patient-centric services.

data.title: Roma Green Finance Calls April 2026 EGM to Seek Share Consolidation Authority
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An announcement from Roma Green Finance Limited ( (ROMA) ) is now available.

Roma Green Finance Limited has called an extraordinary general meeting of shareholders to be held in Hong Kong on April 15, 2026, with March 19, 2026 set as the record date for voting eligibility. The board is soliciting proxies from holders of its Class A, Class B and undesignated shares, encouraging investors to vote even if they do not attend in person.

At the meeting, shareholders will vote on an ordinary resolution authorizing a share consolidation across all classes at a ratio between one-for-two and one-for-250, with the exact ratio and timing to be set by the board by October 12, 2026. The proposal would give directors broad discretion to implement or abandon the consolidation and to manage fractional entitlements, underscoring the company’s effort to preserve flexibility over its capital structure and potential share price normalization, a move of particular relevance to Nasdaq-listed issuers facing minimum price and liquidity considerations.

More about Roma Green Finance Limited

Roma Green Finance Limited is an exempted company incorporated in the Cayman Islands with limited liability and listed on Nasdaq under the ticker ROMA. The company is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong, and has a share capital structure comprising Class A ordinary shares, Class B ordinary shares and undesignated shares, all with a par value of US$0.001 each.

PMGC Holdings ( (ELAB) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 24, 2026, PMGC Holdings said its subsidiary SVM Machining, Inc. has completed registration under the International Traffic in Arms Regulations, confirming compliance with U.S. export-control rules for defense articles and services. The ITAR status allows the California precision CNC specialist to handle controlled defense-related work, broadening its addressable customer base.

PMGC indicated that ITAR compliance strengthens SVM’s ability to bid for defense and aerospace programs that require such credentials and improves its standing as a potential supplier to Tier 1 defense contractors and aerospace OEMs. The move supports PMGC’s broader strategy to deepen its role in high-value defense manufacturing, potentially enhancing its competitive position in regulated, mission-critical supply chains.

More about PMGC Holdings

PMGC Holdings Inc. is a diversified public holding company pursuing a targeted roll-up strategy in U.S.-based manufacturing, managing and growing a portfolio through strategic acquisitions, investments, and development across multiple sectors. Its wholly owned subsidiary, SVM Machining, Inc. dba Silicon Valley Manufacturing, is a California-based ISO 9001:2015 certified precision CNC machining firm that supplies engineered components to mission-critical industries including medical technology, aerospace, semiconductor, biotech, pharmaceutical, and transportation.

SVM is known for technical expertise, robust quality systems, and its ability to deliver complex parts with tight precision tolerances, supporting original equipment manufacturers and advanced technology clients with reliable and responsive production capacity. data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Banco Latinoamericano De Comercio ( (BLX) ) has issued an announcement.

At its March 2026 Investor Day, Bladex reported that it reached or exceeded its ambitious 2026 financial and operational goals ahead of schedule, including expanding its commercial portfolio, improving lending spreads and cost-to-income, strengthening capital ratios, and lifting return on equity while sharply increasing non-interest income. Management highlighted gains in client base, cross-selling, automation and process efficiency, and noted that since 2021 the bank has outperformed key Latin American and U.S. financial benchmarks in cumulative total shareholder return.

The bank outlined a 2030 vision built on disciplined balance-sheet growth, lower funding costs via operating deposits, and a larger contribution from non-interest income, underpinned by cost efficiency and risk discipline to sustain a 16–17% ROE with lower earnings volatility. A central plank is the formal launch of transactional and correspondent banking, using Bladex’s New York Fed access, long-standing regional relationships and trade expertise to offer payment and cash-management services, deepen deposit funding, and exploit “white space” in a fragmented Latin American banking market, particularly among underserved institutions that meet its compliance standards.

The most recent analyst rating on (BLX) stock is a Buy with a $49.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Banco Latinoamericano De Comercio stock, see the BLX Stock Forecast page.

The bank provides lending, trade finance, structured trade and working capital solutions, project finance, treasury and capital markets services, and is expanding into transactional banking, payments, and cash management for regional financial institutions and corporates.

data.title: Actelis Networks to Acquire Exaware, Enter AI Networking
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Actelis Networks, Inc. ( (ASNS) ).

On March 24, 2026, Actelis Networks announced it had signed a binding term sheet to acquire all shares of Israel-based Exaware Ltd. in an all-stock deal, aiming to enter the fast-growing AI-driven data center networking market. The move, which would combine Actelis’ secure edge and hybrid fiber capabilities with Exaware’s high-throughput routing and switching platforms, is intended to create an integrated, cyber-hardened architecture spanning edge, aggregation, and data center environments.

Under the proposed terms, the post-transaction value split is expected to be roughly 40% attributable to Actelis and 60% to Exaware, with 19.9% of Actelis’ outstanding common stock issued at closing and the remainder in non-voting preferred shares convertible later, subject to Nasdaq and regulatory requirements. The transaction, targeted to close by May 7, 2026, remains contingent on definitive agreements, board and regulatory approvals, and includes a 60-day no-shop period and a breakup fee, positioning Actelis to compete more directly in AI-driven network modernization if completed.

The most recent analyst rating on (ASNS) stock is a Hold with a $0.41 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Actelis Networks, Inc. stock, see the ASNS Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ASNS Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ASNS is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by weak financial performance—ongoing operating losses, volatile revenue/margins, and persistent negative operating/free cash flow—partly tempered by improved leverage. Technicals also weigh on the score given the sharp longer-term downtrend and negative MACD. Corporate events add meaningful risk due to Nasdaq delisting uncertainty and financing-related setbacks, while valuation provides limited support because earnings are negative and no dividend yield is indicated.

To see Spark’s full report on ASNS stock, click here.

More about Actelis Networks, Inc.

Actelis Networks, Inc. is a NASDAQ-listed provider of hybrid fiber, cyber-hardened networking solutions focused on rapid deployment for wide-area IoT and broadband applications. Its platforms deliver fiber-grade performance over hybrid fiber-copper networks for government, intelligent transportation, military, utility, rail, telecom, and campus customers, and include AI-based cyber monitoring to secure edge devices.

Exaware Ltd., founded in 2008 and based in Israel, develops high-throughput routing, switching, and open networking solutions for data center, telecom, and high-capacity aggregation environments. The company leverages disaggregated IP/MPLS and open networking architectures to serve carriers and infrastructure operators, and has recently expanded its role in data center networking while maintaining carrier-grade routing offerings.

Average Trading Volume: 30,153,233

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $11.49M

data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Playboy ( (PLBY) ) has issued an announcement.

On March 20, 2026, Playboy completed the initial closing of its transaction to ultimately sell 50% of its China joint venture to United Trademark Group, with UTG now managing all operational aspects of Playboy’s business in China, Hong Kong and Macau. At this initial closing, UTG bought a 16.67% interest in the JV for $15 million, which Playboy used to pay down senior secured debt, and Playboy also received a $4 million brand support payment and began receiving guaranteed minimum JV distributions under a shareholders agreement that provides for annual minimum payments through 2033.

The deal includes a shareholders agreement that sets ownership, governance, transfer restrictions and minimum distribution obligations for the JV, with security interests granted over UTG’s JV shares and detailed termination rights for both parties. Separately, a three-year brand support services agreement requires UTG to reimburse Playboy Enterprises International for up to $10 million in total brand support services over the term, reinforcing Playboy’s asset-light strategy, reducing operating complexity in China and strengthening its balance sheet via contracted cash flows and accelerated debt reduction.

The most recent analyst rating on (PLBY) stock is a Buy with a $3.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Playboy stock, see the PLBY Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Microbot Medical Highlights Pivotal LIBERTY Study Publication Milestone
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest update is out from Microbot Medical ( (MBOT) ).

On March 24, 2026, Microbot Medical announced that results from its ACCESS-PVI pivotal study of the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System have been published in the Journal of Vascular and Interventional Radiology. The multicenter feasibility study, completed in 2025 and led by interventional radiologist Dr. Francois Cornelis, evaluates a disposable, remotely operated robotic system for arterial peripheral vascular interventions.

Publication in JVIR, a leading peer-reviewed journal for interventional radiologists, marks an important validation step, confirming that the study’s methodology and data have undergone rigorous independent review. Coming after the LIBERTY system’s U.S. FDA clearance in September 2025 and ahead of its planned full market launch at the Society of Interventional Radiology conference in April 2026, the paper strengthens the device’s clinical credibility and supports Microbot’s push for broader commercial adoption.

The most recent analyst rating on (MBOT) stock is a Buy with a $12.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Microbot Medical stock, see the MBOT Stock Forecast page.

More about Microbot Medical

Microbot Medical Inc. is a commercial-stage medical device company focused on transforming endovascular procedures through advanced robotic technology. Its flagship product, the LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System, is the world’s first FDA-cleared, single-use, remotely operated robotic solution designed to enhance precision, efficiency and safety in peripheral endovascular care.

Backed by a sizable intellectual property portfolio, Microbot targets interventional radiologists and vascular specialists seeking minimally invasive, image-guided treatments. The company is positioning LIBERTY as a disruptive tool in endovascular robotics, aiming to reduce radiation exposure and physical strain for clinicians while supporting broader adoption through clinical evidence.

An announcement from Harrow Health ( (HROW) ) is now available.

On March 24, 2026, Harrow, Inc. launched a private add-on offering of $50 million in 8.625% senior unsecured notes due 2030, targeting qualified institutional buyers in the U.S. under Rule 144A and non-U.S. investors under Regulation S. The new notes will form a single series with the $250 million of identical 2030 notes issued on September 12, 2025, and will be guaranteed on a senior unsecured basis by certain existing and future restricted subsidiaries.

Harrow plans to use the net proceeds for general corporate purposes, including growth initiatives such as new product launches, product development and strategic business development opportunities, signaling an intention to further scale its ophthalmic portfolio. The transaction, which remains subject to market and other conditions, underscores the company’s reliance on debt markets to fund expansion while highlighting execution and market risks that could prevent completion of the offering on favorable terms or at all.

The most recent analyst rating on (HROW) stock is a Buy with a $70.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Harrow Health stock, see the HROW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on HROW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, HROW is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by leveraged financials, ongoing net losses, and historically weak/volatile cash conversion, alongside a bearish technical trend (below major moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by a positive earnings outlook with specific 2026 revenue/adjusted EBITDA guidance and continued product-driven growth expectations.

To see Spark’s full report on HROW stock, click here.

More about Harrow Health

Harrow, Inc., based in Nashville and listed on Nasdaq as HROW, is a leading North American provider of ophthalmic disease management solutions. The company offers a broad portfolio of medications for conditions affecting both the front and back of the eye, including dry eye disease, neovascular age-related macular degeneration, cataracts, refractive errors, glaucoma, ocular surface disorders and retina diseases, focusing on safe, accessible and affordable therapies that improve outcomes.

Founded with an emphasis on patient compliance and clinical effectiveness, Harrow has built a market position around comprehensive ophthalmic coverage rather than single-condition products. data.title: Karyopharm Announces Financing and Positive SENTRY Trial Results
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

Karyopharm Therapeutics ( (KPTI) ) has provided an update.

On March 24, 2026, Karyopharm announced a $30 million private placement with RA Capital Management, issuing common stock, pre-funded warrants and additional common stock warrants, with potential extra proceeds of about $44 million upon full warrant exercise. The financing, alongside approximately $9.6 million raised via its at-the-market program earlier in March, is intended to fund general corporate purposes and clinical trials and will satisfy a key capital-raise condition to activate previously agreed amendments and forbearance on its credit facilities and convertible notes.

The same day, the company reported topline data from its pivotal Phase 3 SENTRY trial in frontline myelofibrosis, where selinexor plus ruxolitinib met one co-primary endpoint with a near-doubling of spleen volume responses versus ruxolitinib alone but did not improve symptoms over control. Investigators observed a promising overall survival signal and evidence of potential disease modification, with a manageable safety profile, positioning Karyopharm to discuss a supplemental U.S. filing and potentially strengthen selinexor’s role in myelofibrosis while it awaits additional Phase 2 and Phase 3 readouts in 2026.

Also in March 2026, Karyopharm agreed to voluntarily withdraw the accelerated approval of XPOVIO’s diffuse large B-cell lymphoma indication at the FDA’s request, after concluding the required confirmatory trial was no longer feasible in an evolving treatment landscape. The move, which affects an indication that generates only immaterial revenue and leaves other XPOVIO approvals intact, allows the company to halt development spending in DLBCL and reallocate resources toward more commercially and clinically viable programs.

The most recent analyst rating on (KPTI) stock is a Hold with a $8.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Karyopharm Therapeutics stock, see the KPTI Stock Forecast page.

Karyopharm Therapeutics Inc. is a commercial-stage pharmaceutical company focused on pioneering novel cancer therapies, including the XPO1 inhibitor selinexor. The company targets hematologic malignancies and solid tumors, with a market focus on advancing combination regimens in indications such as myelofibrosis, endometrial cancer and other difficult-to-treat cancers.

data.title: Rezolute Prepares FDA Submission After sunRIZE Trial Review
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

An update from Rezolute ( (RZLT) ) is now available.

On March 24, 2026, Rezolute reported outcomes from a March 17 in-person Type B FDA meeting regarding sunRIZE, its Phase 3 trial of ersodetug in congenital hyperinsulinism, after the study previously failed to meet its primary endpoint in December 2025 despite reductions in hypoglycemia events. The company highlighted clinically meaningful continuous glucose monitoring improvements, pharmacologic activity and encouraging open-label extension data, and, following FDA acknowledgment of trial-design challenges, was encouraged to submit full study reports and datasets for independent review that could determine whether a marketing application is viable or if further data will be required, with an update expected in the second half of 2026.

The FDA meeting focused on sunRIZE trial outcomes and behavioral factors that may have confounded hypoglycemia measurements, while still emphasizing the need for adequate and well-controlled evidence. Rezolute now plans to provide comprehensive data packages to support FDA’s independent assessment, a step that could materially influence the future of ersodetug in congenital HI and the availability of new treatment options for this underserved patient community.

The most recent analyst rating on (RZLT) stock is a Hold with a $2.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rezolute stock, see the RZLT Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Cadeler Convenes April 21, 2026 AGM to Renew Board Mandates and Capital Authorisations
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks Premium

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

The latest announcement is out from Cadeler A/S Sponsored ADR ( (CDLR) ).

Cadeler A/S has called its annual general meeting for April 21, 2026 in Copenhagen, where shareholders will review the company’s activities in 2025, approve the annual and remuneration reports, decide on profit allocation, and vote on discharging the board and executive management from liability. The agenda also includes re-election of key board members and leadership, authorization to acquire treasury shares, appointment of an auditor, and several changes to the Articles of Association, notably refreshed capital increase mandates and an updated meeting venue definition, underscoring the company’s focus on maintaining governance flexibility and future financing options.

Shareholders will be asked to re-elect Colette Cohen, Ditlev Wedell-Wedellsborg and Thomas Thune Andersen to the board for two-year terms, and to confirm Andreas Sohmen-Pao and Emanuele Lauro as chair and vice chair for one year, respectively. Proposals to replace or extend authorizations for issuing new shares, including at or below market price and for employee-related share issuances, as well as an updated combined authorization cap, signal that Cadeler is preserving strategic latitude for potential capital raising and incentive programs as it continues to support large-scale offshore wind development.

The most recent analyst rating on (CDLR) stock is a Buy with a $27.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Cadeler A/S Sponsored ADR stock, see the CDLR Stock Forecast page.

data.title: QuidelOrtho Announces Chief Legal Officer Leadership Transition
data.description:

  • Stay ahead of the market with the latest news and analysis and maximize your portfolio's potential

QuidelOrtho ( (QDEL) ) has shared an update.

On March 18, 2026, QuidelOrtho announced that Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary Michelle A. Hodges plans to retire from her roles effective March 23, 2026, with a structured transition agreement in place. She will remain with the company for up to six months to transition her duties and then serve as special advisor to the CEO for up to 24 months, retaining salary, reduced over time, and continued eligibility for benefits and equity vesting during this period.

As part of its board-led succession planning, QuidelOrtho appointed Nathaniel “Nate” Sisitsky as Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary effective March 23, 2026. Sisitsky, a veteran legal executive with more than 25 years of experience in life sciences and medtech, previously held top legal roles at STAAR Surgical, NuVasive and CareFusion, and is expected to reinforce QuidelOrtho’s legal, compliance and governance capabilities as it pursues long-term growth and navigates complex regulatory and transformational initiatives.

The leadership transition underscores QuidelOrtho’s emphasis on continuity and governance stability at a time of ongoing strategic evolution in the diagnostics sector. By retaining Hodges in an advisory role while installing a seasoned successor, the company aims to mitigate transition risk, maintain momentum on strategic and regulatory matters, and signal to investors and other stakeholders that its legal function remains tightly aligned with its growth and transformation agenda.

The most recent analyst rating on (QDEL) stock is a Sell with a $14.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on QuidelOrtho stock, see the QDEL Stock Forecast page.
